inputs.description:
Run the network tables build script to materialize network_edges and network_agents.

cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.network.build_network_tables data/index/bibliographic.db data/normalization/place_geocodes.json

Verify:
  python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); e=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM network_edges').fetchone()[0]; a=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM network_agents').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Edges: {e}, Agents: {a}')"
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); e=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM network_edges').fetchone()[0]; a=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM network_agents').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Edges: {e}, Agents: {a}')"
